message:
🐛 Fix plural for 'consecutive failures/passes' when count is 1 (#1130)

Use singular form ("consecutive failure", "consecutive pass") when the
streak count is exactly 1, both in the UI badge and in the AI-generated
summary text.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -896,7 +896,9 @@
     "lastFail": "Last fail",
     "totalRuns": "Total runs",
     "consecutivePasses": "consecutive passes",
+    "consecutivePass": "consecutive pass",
     "consecutiveFailures": "consecutive failures",
+    "consecutiveFailure": "consecutive failure",
     "passFailTrend": "Pass/Fail Trend",
     "guides": "Guides",
     "failing": "Failing",
